text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Hispanic/Latino Community 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter At Risk Families Domestic Violence Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Native American Community Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES MADRAS LATINO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term, high-intensity residential drug and alcohol treatment. 236 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 475-5300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES MADRAS LATINO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers intensive outpatient treatment for alcohol and drug recovery and non-pharmacological approaches to pain management. 236 SE D Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Outpatient treatment: By appointment only Email (541) 475-5300 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFESTANCE HEALTH LIFESTANCE HEALTH PORTLAND NE MLK CONEXIONES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers culturally and linguistically specific psychological evaluations and counseling. Evaluations are offered for cognitive functioning, attention problems (ADHD), disabilities, autism, and learning problems or disabilities for individuals from kindergarten age to college/university age. 3500 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Hispanic and Latinx identified individuals Hours: Front Desk: Monday-Friday 9am-6:30pm Appointments: Varies (503) 327-8205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recovery services for alcohol and substance abuse, gambling, and other addictions. Early intervention classes for youth who have received minor-in-possession are also available. Treatment by phone or telehealth. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Recovery Center Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Other services by appointment only Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide individual and group therapy for individuals seeking treatment for addictions, including problem gambling. Also provide peer, educational, and prevention services for adults, youth, and families. 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: 11am-9pm Monday-Friday (541) 686-8483 2 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BESTCARE TREATMENT SERVICES RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT LIFESTANCE HEALTH CONEXIONES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES
